meaning: n.翻译,译文,转化,调任,转换[物][数]平移
examples: The irony is lost in translation.
The book loses something in translation.
I have only read Tolstoy in translation.
Either some meaning has been lost in translation or the owners are trying to out-baffle English-speaking tourists.
And I'll probably need a translation, though, if you're asking the question in Korean.
